## TRM1.3. Adherence to ATFM slots (PI#1) {#trm1.3.-adherence-to-atfm-slots-pi1 .Heading-2-TZ}

ATFM slot adherence in 2025 was equal to 97.0%, very close to 2024 value -- last year of RP3 -- of 97.1%. The three largest airports (Lisbon, Porto, Faro) all had adherence above 96.5%. Santa Maria was the airport with the lowest adherence, 88.5%, still well above the standard target of 80%.

With regard to the 3.0% of flights that did not adhere across the country, 2.4% were early and 0.6% were late.

The average for RP4 airports subject to monitoring of ATFM slot adherence across Member States in 2025 was 96.1%.
